name: indian-labour-drafting
description: Open-source Claude-compatible plugin for drafting Indian labour, industrial-disputes, employment-rights, social-security, and workplace-protection pleadings. State-config-aware design — the plugin's structural skeletons are uniform across pleading types, and the State-specific Shops and Establishments Act, the State-specific Labour Welfare Fund Act, the State-specific Industrial Court / Labour Court hierarchy (two-tier or three-tier), the State-specific Profession Tax rules, the workman's wages, the period of service, the alleged misconduct, the workman's status (workman / supervisor / managerial), the establishment type (factory / shop / commercial establishment / IT enabled), the union recognition position, and the limitation-clock anchor are supplied by the user via a case-config file. Drafting workflows for Industrial Disputes Act 1947 Section 10 government reference, Section 2A workman's direct application (post-2010 amendment), Statement of Claim before Labour Court / Industrial Tribunal, POSH Act 2013 Section 9 internal complaint to the Internal Committee, State Shops and Establishments Act show-cause reply, Payment of Gratuity Act 1972 controlling-authority claim, EPF Act 1952 Section 7A determination challenge before the EPF Appellate Tribunal, ESI Act 1948 Section 75 application before the Employees' Insurance Court, Minimum Wages Act 1948 Section 20 claim before the Authority, and Industrial Employment (Standing Orders) Act 1946 certification draft. Includes the 6-agent drafting pipeline (Reader -> Format -> Drafter -> Verifier -> Refiner -> Overseer), shared labour drafting base with ID Act 1947 + Trade Unions Act 1926 + POSH Act 2013 + Factories Act 1948 + four Labour Codes 2019-2020 (variable State notification) + Payment of Wages Act 1936 + Minimum Wages Act 1948 + Workmen's Compensation Act 1923 + EPF Act 1952 + ESI Act 1948 + Payment of Gratuity Act 1972 + Maternity Benefit Act 1961 + Contract Labour (R&A) Act 1970 + IESO Act 1946 + State Shops and Establishments Act + State Labour Welfare Fund Act + Bharatiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita 2023 + Bharatiya Sakshya Adhiniyam 2023 discipline encoded.
